description_long: This is a stout, wooden barrel with a classic bulging midsection and reinforced by several dark, horizontal bands that encircle its body. The top is open, revealing a fill of small, dark, rounded objects that resemble coal or stones. The wood staves are vertically aligned and have a slightly matte finish, giving the barrel a rustic, utilitarian appearance. The bands appear to be made of metal, providing structural support and a visual contrast to the brown wood. There are no visible handles or markings on the exterior. The overall design suggests it is used for storage or transport of bulk materials in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A wooden barrel with metal bands, open at the top and filled with small, dark objects resembling coal or stones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top filled with dark, rounded objects and the prominent metal bands around the wooden body.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the barrel and the texture of the wood and bands.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the bulging midsection and the even distribution of the metal bands.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the open top and the contents inside, similar to the front but from the rear.
